result.stdout:
USAGE:
    ivy-inspector-retool [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

COMMANDS:
    docs                           Output full tool specification in YAML       
    extract <zip> <destination>    Extract the zip contents to a destination    
                                   directory                                    
    list <zip>                     List all file paths in the zip               
    read <zip> <path>              Output the raw contents of a file from the   
                                   zip

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Extract the zip contents to a destination directory

USAGE:
    ivy-inspector-retool extract <zip> <destination> [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    <zip>            Path to the Retool export .zip file  
    <destination>    Destination directory to extract into

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

commands.payload:

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Output the raw contents of a file from the zip

USAGE:
    ivy-inspector-retool read <zip> <path> [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    <zip>     Path to the Retool export .zip file
    <path>    Path of the file inside the zip    

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information
